summary: Verified ADR 0266 on the latest-main workstream branch by declaring validation-runner contracts, recording per-run environment attestations on the build-server and pre-push gate paths, and proving the rebased branch end to end against the remote build gateway.

verification.check: Build-server workspace and immutable snapshot handoff
verification.observed: `make check-build-server` passed from commit `d9a17397`, verified SSH reachability to `ops@10.10.10.30`, created the session workspace `/home/ops/builds/proxmox_florin_server/.lv3-session-workspaces/ws-0266-validation-runner-capability-contracts-8be65b3b1f/repo`, and confirmed immutable snapshot upload for the rebased branch.

`make remote-validate` passed from commit `d9a17397`; `.local/validation-gate/remote-validate-last-run.json` recorded `source=build-server-validate`, `runner.id=build-server-validation`, `cpu_architecture=x86_64`, and all six requested validation lanes passing on the build server.

`make pre-push-gate` passed from commit `d9a17397`; `.local/validation-gate/last-run.json` recorded `source=build-server`, `runner.id=build-server-validation`, and all 15 configured gate checks passing on the rebased workstream branch.

notes: This receipt records branch-local proof on top of the latest origin/main lineage before protected release files were updated on main.

The canonical mainline replay still remains to be recorded under receipts/live-applies/2026-03-29-adr-0266-validation-runner-capability-contracts-mainline-live-apply.json after merge, release, and worker post-merge verification.
versions/stack.yaml, VERSION, changelog.md, RELEASE.md, docs/release-notes, and ADR implementation-version metadata intentionally remain unchanged on this workstream branch.
